---
title: "Xtophe Bontemps"
---


## Your current role  
*(e.g., Data Scientist | Official Statistics | Data Visualization)*

---

Your short bio goes here. Keep it tight:
- who you are  
- what you do  
- what you care about  

---

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### Focus areas
- Official statistics  
- Data visualization  
- Machine learning  
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Current work
- Training statisticians  
- Research on data communication  
- Applied analytics  
:::
:::
